ppjkLicenceNumber.description: PPJK (Pengusaha Pengurusan Jasa Kepabeanan) licence number — Indonesian customs-broker licence. Governs who may file customs declarations on behalf of importers/exporters. Only applicable to the CUSTOMS_BROKER role.

driverLicenceNumber.description: SIM (Surat Izin Mengemudi) — Indonesian driving licence number

driverLicenceCategory.description: SIM category — Indonesian driving licence classes. A: small passenger cars / light commercial. B_I: heavy trucks under 3500kg. B_II: trailer/trucks over 3500kg. C: motorcycles. D: disabled-persons vehicles.
